name: Family Favorite Fudge Brownies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup salted butter, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Grease an 8-inch square baking pan.
3. In a saucepan, melt baking chocolate and butter over medium-low heat, stirring until almost melted but not fully liquid.
4. Remove from heat and stir until smooth.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs on medium speed until light and fluffy with a light yellow color.
6. Gradually add sugar and blend on low until well combined.
7. Stir in vanilla and almond extracts, then mix in flour and coffee crystals until the batter is smooth.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
9. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the top.
10. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until set and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Allow to cool to room temperature before chilling for about an hour before cutting.
This recipe provides clear, step-by-step instructions and ingredient lists as requested.
